overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Last of Us Part II showing a character exploring an overgrown post-apocalyptic residential neighborhood. The character walks from a derelict pool area through abandoned streets with heavy vegetation, eventually meeting a companion and continuing through an apartment complex.

events.description: passing through metal gate from paved pool courtyard into overgrown grassy alley

agents.ego_description: walking away from the derelict swimming pool toward and through a metal gate into an overgrown passage

tall iron gate leading from courtyard to alleyway
residential building facade covered in dense climbing vines

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in an abandoned residential backyard featuring a derelict swimming pool filled with algae. The character walks across a paved courtyard toward a metal gate, passing through it to enter an overgrown alleyway between buildings.

events.description: emerging from grassy alley onto cracked asphalt street with abandoned vehicles

agents.ego_description: walking through tall grass and weeds between abandoned residential buildings

weathered wooden bench against building wall
derelict vehicle partially visible through trees

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow alley densely overgrown with tall grass between abandoned houses. A weathered wooden bench sits against one building. The segment ends as the character emerges onto a cracked asphalt street with abandoned vehicles visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned residential street with derelict vehicles

events.description: companion character appears and joins the player character

agents.ego_description: walking down the cracked asphalt street past abandoned cars toward an apartment complex

entered.detail: broken pavement with grass growing through cracks
rusted brown sedan with damaged windows
derelict dark-colored SUV parked on the side
two-story residential building with external staircases

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a cracked asphalt street lined with abandoned vehicles including a rusted sedan and SUV. The path leads toward a two-story apartment building in the distance. At the end of the segment, a companion character appears and joins the walk.

events.description: entering the apartment complex courtyard from the street

agents.ego_description: walking alongside a female companion through the abandoned neighborhood toward the apartment complex

notable_agents.action: female companion walking alongside the player character

entered.detail: blue sign with white text identifying the complex
rusted brown pickup truck with open doors
external metal staircase leading to upper floors

segments.scene_description: Walking with a companion through the abandoned residential area, the characters pass abandoned vehicles and approach an apartment complex. They enter the courtyard of the complex, passing a blue sign and a rusted pickup truck, with external staircases visible on the building facades.

scene_state.functional_zone: apartment courtyard transitioning to wooded path

events.description: exiting the apartment courtyard into a densely wooded area

agents.ego_description: walking with companion through the apartment courtyard and into a wooded path with dense vegetation

notable_agents.action: companion leading the way through the courtyard exit

entered.detail: narrow trail leading through dense trees and undergrowth
mature tree with thick trunk in the courtyard
red brick residential building visible through trees

segments.scene_description: The characters walk through the apartment complex courtyard, passing abandoned vehicles and mature trees. They exit the courtyard into a wooded path with dense vegetation on both sides, continuing through the overgrown residential area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a derelict residential neighborhood that transitions from a secluded backyard into a sprawling, overgrown apartment complex. It begins in a paved courtyard beside an algae-filled swimming pool, moving through a metal gate into a narrow alleyway densely choked with tall grass and weathered furniture. As the character emerges from the alley, the scene opens onto a cracked asphalt street lined with rusted sedans and SUVs, where a companion eventually appears to join the journey. The path then leads the pair into the courtyard of a two-story apartment complex, passing a blue sign and a rusted pickup truck beneath external staircases. Finally, the camera follows them as they leave the complex behind, shifting from the open courtyard into a wooded path enveloped by dense vegetation.
